net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.impl

Class TravelClassImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.impl.BasicNotifierImpl
      • org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.BasicEObjectImpl
        • org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.MinimalEObjectImpl
          • org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.MinimalEObjectImpl.Container
            • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.impl.TravelClassImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    TravelClass, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier, org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EStructuralFeature.Internal.DynamicValueHolder, org.eclipse.emf.ecore.InternalEObject

    public class TravelClassImpl
extends org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.MinimalEObjectImpl.Container
implements TravelClass
    An implementation of the model object ' Travel Class'.

    The following features are implemented:

    • Rows
    • Sequence
    • Passengers
    • Available Seats
    • Seat Pitch
    • XDimension Of Seats
    • YDimension Of Seats
    • Name
    • Row Structure
    • Load Factor
    • Travel Option
